about.description: I'm a dedicated Frontend Developer with 8 years of experience, primarily focused on creating modern, performant, and maintainable web interfaces. I have a strong background in E-commerce development, with over 4 years of experience working extensively with Salesforce SFRA and Shopify. My expertise includes building scalable architectures, optimizing performance, and delivering seamless user experiences on these platforms.
about.passion: I'm passionate about building user-friendly, high-quality web applications. I enjoy supporting my teammates, learning new technologies when needed, and continuously improving my craft.
about.experience_1: 8+ years of experience in Frontend development
about.experience_2: 1 year of experience in Backend development with Laravel
about.experience_3: Experienced with Salesforce (3 years) and Shopify (2 years)
about.clean_code_desc: Writing maintainable, readable, and performance-optimized code
about.design_desc: Focusing on clean layouts and interactive, intuitive interfaces
about.performance_desc: Applying best practices like lazy loading, code splitting, and optimization
about.collaboration_desc: Good listener and supportive teammate, open to feedback and new challenges

portfolio-website.title: Portfolio Website
portfolio-website.description: A responsive portfolio website with modern design and smooth animations.

experience.title: Work Experience
experience.subtitle: Companies I've had the pleasure of working with

groove-technology.h1: Developed and maintained Salesforce SFRA projects: new features, bug fixes, template editing (ISML, SCSS, JS), and custom controllers/models/services.
groove-technology.h2: Built Shopify storefronts using Liquid theme; created custom sections, templates, and metafields.
groove-technology.h3: Gained experience with Shopify API/GraphQL and contributed to custom apps and UI extensions.
groove-technology.h4: Participated in code reviews and wrote development guidelines for the team.
groove-technology.h6: Collaborated closely with clients to understand and fulfill business requirements.

rivercrane-vietnam.h1: Built layouts, templates, and forms using Laravel Blade with validation error handling.
rivercrane-vietnam.h2: Developed reusable Vue.js components with API integration and dynamic data rendering.
rivercrane-vietnam.h3: Implemented form validation and interactive UI/animation features.
rivercrane-vietnam.h4: Used SCSS alongside UI libraries such as Bootstrap and Vuetify.
rivercrane-vietnam.h5: Participated in performance optimization: lazy loading and code splitting.

k-soft.h1: Developed the back-end system using Laravel, including database design.
k-soft.h2: Built the majority of CRUD APIs to serve the mobile application.
k-soft.h3: Implemented authentication/authorization features and file upload processing.
k-soft.h4: Used Laravel queues, schedulers, migrations, and seeds; optimized code for maintainability and performance.
